Hi Flavia! I'm Mark, your mentor for this year. What are your goals for your career?
Hi Mark! I want to improve my English, because it is an important skill for the missions.
That's a great goal. And what would you like to achieve this year?
I would like to work on an international mission and grow my network with new partners.
Wonderful. Do you want to present your project in English, too?
Yes, I do! It is a big challenge, but I want to try. This is a great opportunity for me.
I want to improve my English this year.
I would like to work on an international mission.
My dream is to grow in my career.
This is a great opportunity for me.
I would like to achieve my goals and find success.

Hi Flavia, it's Nina. I want to talk about your goals for this year. First, you want to improve your English for the international missions. That is a great goal, and I would like to help you. Next month, we want to visit two new countries, and you would like to present your project in English. I know you can achieve it. This is a big opportunity for your career. Let's talk soon!

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the Small Business Development Program. This year, we want to help you grow your company and improve your skills. Many consultants would like to work on international missions, and this program is a great opportunity. Today, three speakers want to share their goals with you. We would like to start at ten o'clock. This is your moment to succeed. Enjoy the program!

This year, I have five goals. First, I want to improve my English every week. Then, I would like to present my project in English at a fair. Next, I want to grow my network with new partners. After that, I would like to work on an international mission. Finally, I want to achieve success in my career.
